items.title_en: Oil jumps as U.S. fresh strikes on Iran raise worries of extended disruption to energy flows
items.title_zh: 美国对伊朗的新打击引发了对能源流动长期中断的担忧，油价上涨
items.desc_en: Oil prices jumped on Thursday after the United States launched a fresh round of military strikes against targets in Iran.
items.desc_zh: 在美国对伊朗目标发动新一轮军事打击后，周四油价上涨。

items.desc_en: CNBC's Jim Cramer said one of the biggest risks facing the SpaceX IPO is speculators who may rush to sell shares shortly after the stock begins trading.

items.title_en: Analysis: Trump said he loves inflation. Why that should be music to Kevin Warsh's ears
items.title_zh: 分析：特朗普表示他喜欢通货膨胀。为什么这对凯文·沃什来说是美妙的音乐
items.desc_en: The president said Wednesday he is happy with inflation at 4.2%. That will be welcome news for new Fed Chair Kevin Warsh.
items.desc_zh: 总统周三表示，他对 4.2% 的通胀率感到满意。对于新任美联储主席凯文·沃什来说，这将是一个受欢迎的消息。

items.title_en: Watch: Thousands fill Barcelona streets for Pope Leo visit
items.title_zh: 观看：数千人挤满巴塞罗那街道等待教皇利奥访问
items.desc_en: Pope Leo XIV visited Barcelona's iconic Sagrada Família basilica as part of his week-long visit to Spain.
items.desc_zh: 教皇利奥十四世在为期一周的西班牙之行中参观了巴塞罗那标志性的圣家堂。

items.title_en: French singer Patrick Bruel faces rape charges
items.title_zh: 法国歌手帕特里克·布鲁埃尔面临强奸指控
items.desc_en: Bruel has been placed under judicial investigation, which means an examining magistrate will look more deeply into the case.
items.desc_zh: 布鲁尔已接受司法调查，这意味着预审法官将更深入地调查此案。

items.title_en: Oracle beats on earnings, but stock drops on plans to raise another $20 billion
items.title_zh: 甲骨文盈利好于预期，但因计划再融资 200 亿美元而股价下跌
items.desc_en: Oracle reported better-than-expected earnings and revenue for its fiscal fourth quarter.
items.desc_zh: 甲骨文公布的第四财季盈利和收入好于预期。

items.title_en: USDA's Rollins called screwworm a 'little pest' amid U.S. spread. Last year, she called it 'terrifying'
items.title_zh: 美国农业部的罗林斯称螺旋虫是美国传播中的“小害虫”。去年，她称其“可怕”
items.desc_en: The U.S. agriculture secretary is downplaying the threat posed by the spreading screwworm now compared with her more dire remarks last year.
items.desc_zh: 与去年更可怕的言论相比，美国农业部长现在淡化了螺旋蝇传播所带来的威胁。

items.title_en: Bill Gates says Epstein wanted personal relationship, but he 'never reciprocated'
items.title_zh: 比尔·盖茨称爱泼斯坦想要建立私人关系，但他“从未给予回应”
items.desc_en: The Microsoft co-founder spent hours talking to lawmakers behind closed doors, where he also said Epstein used his marital infidelities to pressure him.
items.desc_zh: 这位微软联合创始人花了几个小时与立法者闭门交谈，他还表示爱泼斯坦利用他的婚姻不忠向他施加压力。

items.title_en: Trump says U.S. secretly moved more than 100 million barrels of oil through Strait of Hormuz
items.title_zh: 特朗普称美国秘密通过霍尔木兹海峡运输超过1亿桶石油
items.desc_en: Trump's comments come after Energy Secretary Chris Wright said Tuesday that oil exports through Hormuz are "rising very meaningfully."
items.desc_zh: 特朗普发表此番言论之前，能源部长克里斯·赖特周二表示，通过霍尔木兹海峡的石油出口“正在大幅增长”。

items.title_en: Trump keeps saying an Iran deal is close. Markets keep believing it
items.title_zh: 特朗普一直表示伊朗协议即将达成。市场仍然相信这一点
items.desc_en: Analysts still assume that, despite the continued conflict, a deal will eventually be reached that ends the war and reopens the Strait of Hormuz.
items.desc_zh: 分析人士仍然认为，尽管冲突持续不断，最终仍将达成一项协议，结束战争并重新开放霍尔木兹海峡。

items.title_en: Oil prices rise after Trump says U.S. will attack Iran 'very hard'
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示美国将“非常严厉”地攻击伊朗后油价上涨
items.desc_en: Oil prices rose after the U.S. launched military strikes against Iran, raising concerns that renewed clashes may threaten shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.
items.desc_zh: 美国对伊朗发动军事打击后，油价上涨，引发人们对新一轮冲突可能威胁霍尔木兹海峡航运的担忧。

items.title_en: These stocks pay attractive dividends and offer 'turmoil insurance'
items.title_zh: 这些股票支付有吸引力的股息并提供“动荡保险”
items.desc_en: Investors looking for stability in times of volatility often turn to dividend stocks — including real estate investment trusts. Here is one analyst's top picks.
items.desc_zh: 在波动时期寻求稳定的投资者通常会转向派息股票，包括房地产投资信托基金。以下是一位分析师的首选。

items.title_en: Whale graveyard dating back five million years discovered
items.title_zh: 发现距今五百万年的鲸鱼墓地
items.desc_en: The Indian Ocean site is "far beyond anything we had imagined", one researcher says.
items.desc_zh: 一位研究人员表示，印度洋遗址“远远超出了我们的想象”。

items.title_en: Wall Street needs a crash course in the token economy ahead of AI IPOs. SpaceX offers a preview
items.title_zh: 在人工智能 IPO 之前，华尔街需要上一堂代币经济速成课。 SpaceX 提供预览
items.desc_en: When OpenAI and Anthropic make their IPO prospectuses available to the public, investors are going to have to learn about a whole new economy.
items.desc_zh: 当 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 向公众公开其 IPO 招股说明书时，投资者将不得不了解一个全新的经济体。

items.desc_zh: Rothschild & Co. Redburn 认为工业气体供应商 Linde 与 SpaceX 一样成为潜在受益者。

items.title_en: Three Indian sailors missing after US says it hit tanker in Gulf of Oman
items.title_zh: 美国称在阿曼湾击中油轮后三名印度水手失踪
items.desc_en: India's government said three Indian sailors were missing and 21 crew had been rescued after the hit on the Settebello off the coast of Oman.
items.desc_zh: 印度政府表示，阿曼海岸附近的塞特贝洛号遭遇袭击，造成 3 名印度水手失踪，21 名船员获救。

items.title_zh: 特朗普表示“我喜欢通货膨胀”，因为美国正在“夺走”伊朗石油 - 哥伦比亚广播公司新闻
items.desc_en: Trump says "I love the inflation" because U.S. is "taking out" Iranian oil  CBS News'The die has been cast': Trump allies fear it's too late to reverse economic woes  Politico'I love the inflation': T

items.title_en: World Cup travel boost hasn't materialized for U.S. businesses — yet
items.title_zh: 世界杯旅行对美国企业的推动尚未实现
items.desc_en: The expected travel boom from the World Cup is looking like it will be a city-by-city, match-by-match test of pricing power.
items.desc_zh: 世界杯带来的预期旅游热潮看起来将是对每个城市、每场比赛定价能力的考验。

items.title_en: Trump says 'I love the inflation' after consumer price index hits 3-year high
items.title_zh: 消费者价格指数创三年新高后特朗普表示“我喜欢通货膨胀”
items.desc_en: President Trump suggested that inflation would drop when the U.S. war against Iran ends, and said,  "we've been taking out millions of barrels of oil."
items.desc_zh: 特朗普总统表示，当美国对伊朗的战争结束时，通胀将会下降，并表示，“我们已经消耗了数百万桶石油。”

items.title_en: Trump pledges more Iran attacks, saying U.S. will be 'attacking them very hard'
items.title_zh: 特朗普承诺对伊朗发动更多袭击，称美国将“非常严厉地打击他们”
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump promised more attacks on Iran after strikes resumed this week. Earlier this week, he said a deal to end the war was near.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统承诺在本周恢复袭击后对伊朗进行更多袭击。本周早些时候，他表示即将达成结束战争的协议。

items.title_en: Norway crown princess's son to stay in custody before rape verdict, says court
items.title_zh: 法庭称，挪威王储妃的儿子在强奸案判决前将被拘留
items.desc_en: Thr ruling overturns a lower court's decision on Monday ordering the release of the crown princess's 29-year-old son.
items.desc_zh: 这项裁决推翻了下级法院周一下令释放王储妃 29 岁儿子的决定。

items.title_en: College sticker prices top $100,000 at 16 schools — but many students pay significantly less
items.title_zh: 16 所学校的大学标价高达 10 万美元，但许多学生支付的费用要低得多
items.desc_en: The cost of attendance at a growing number of colleges is now more than six figures a year, according to data from The Princeton Review.
items.desc_zh: 根据《普林斯顿评论》的数据，越来越多的大学的入学费用现在每年超过六位数。

items.title_en: Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill 17, reports say
items.title_zh: 报道称，以色列对黎巴嫩南部的袭击造成 17 人死亡
items.desc_en: Nine of them were killed in a series of attacks in the town of Tayr Debba, according to Lebanon's state news agency.
items.desc_zh: 据黎巴嫩国家通讯社报道，其中九人在泰尔德巴镇发生的一系列袭击中丧生。

items.title_en: Growing backlash in Japan over Trump's use of anime characters
items.title_zh: 日本对特朗普使用动漫人物的强烈反对日益强烈
items.desc_en: The US president has angered some fans by using the images of characters like Pikachu and Naruto.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统使用皮卡丘和火影忍者等角色的形象激怒了一些粉丝。

items.title_en: Texas teen sentenced to 35 years for killing fellow student at athletics event - BBC
items.title_zh: 德克萨斯州青少年因在田径比赛中杀害同学而被判处 35 年徒刑 - BBC

items.title_en: Trump and Iran trade new threats after strikes exchanged
items.title_zh: 特朗普和伊朗在相互攻击后交换了新的威胁
items.desc_en: The US president warns Iran "will have to pay the price" for taking too long to agree a deal, after Tehran vows retaliation to any attacks.
items.desc_zh: 在德黑兰誓言对任何袭击进行报复后，美国总统警告伊朗“将不得不付出代价”，因为花了太长时间才达成协议。

items.title_en: Ukraine says missiles hit military plant deep inside Russia
items.title_zh: 乌克兰称导弹袭击了俄罗斯境内的军事工厂
items.desc_en: Ukraine's military also says it has struck a Russian oil refinery and a "shadow fleet" oil tanker in the Black Sea.
items.desc_zh: 乌克兰军方还表示，它袭击了黑海的一家俄罗斯炼油厂和一艘“影子舰队”油轮。

items.title_zh: 加拿大航空飞行员被指控在没有有效执照的情况下驾驶了 900 多次航班：“就像电影剧本一样” - 哥伦比亚广播公司新闻

items.title_en: Pakistan launches deadly air strikes in Afghanistan, reigniting tensions
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦对阿富汗发动致命空袭，重燃紧张局势
items.desc_en: The fresh strikes come after weeks of relative calm in the restive border region between the two countries.
items.desc_zh: 新的袭击发生之前，两国边境地区动荡不安，经历了数周的相对平静。

items.title_en: Zelensky under pressure to end row with Poland over WW2 name of army unit
items.title_zh: 泽伦斯基面临压力，要求结束与波兰关于二战陆军单位名称的争执
items.desc_en: Poland is threatening to strip Ukraine's president of a state honour over the naming Ukrainian military unit after controversial World War Two fighters.
items.desc_zh: 波兰威胁要剥夺乌克兰总统的国家荣誉，因为它以有争议的第二次世界大战战士的名字命名了乌克兰军队。

items.title_en: World Cup referee denied US entry arrives home to hero's welcome in Somalia
items.title_zh: 世界杯裁判拒绝美国入境 回到家乡索马里受到英雄般的欢迎
items.desc_en: Omar Artan vows to officiate at the 2030 tournament instead, following his ban from entering the US.
items.desc_zh: 在被禁止进入美国之后，奥马尔·阿坦 (Omar Artan) 发誓将担任 2030 年锦标赛的裁判。

items.title_en: Firms charged with manslaughter over deadly Hong Kong fire
items.title_zh: 香港致命火灾公司被控过失杀人罪
items.desc_en: The Wang Fuk Court blaze last year was the deadliest that Hong Kong had seen in 70 years, killing 168 people.
items.desc_zh: 去年宏福苑大火是香港70年来最严重的火灾，造成168人死亡。

items.title_en: Twelve killed in mass shooting in Johannesburg, police say
items.title_zh: 警方称约翰内斯堡大规模枪击事件已造成十二人死亡
items.desc_en: Another nine people were injured at an informal settlement in Cleveland late on Tuesday.
items.desc_zh: 周二晚间，克利夫兰一处非正式定居点另有九人受伤。

items.desc_zh: 贝尔法斯特街头刺伤事件爆发后，英国领导人呼吁保持冷静 NPRN 刺伤袭击后，暴力之夜席卷贝尔法斯特 《纽约时报》 新一波反移民暴力袭击美国

items.desc_zh: 这些虚假广告的主角是英格兰银行行长，该银行已敦促人们举报这些广告。

items.desc_zh: Meta 指责欧盟“监管越权”，并表示其决定将允许 OpenAI 等科技巨头免费使用 WhatsApp。
